title: Cable Utilization
subtitle: Live cable load from the FRITZ!Box utilization view.
note: Values reflect the FRITZ!Box cable utilization view and should be interpreted as live cable-load telemetry, not a guaranteed CMTS-wide utilization metric.
unsupported_driver: This view is only available for FRITZ!Box cable devices.
demo_mode: Cable utilization is unavailable in demo mode.
fetch_failed: Cable utilization could not be loaded from the FRITZ!Box right now.
